question.content: For the beam-rod coupled system, determine the rod force reaction B_y from superposition and compatibility at B. Output exactly one expression token sequence in plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no sentence, no equality sign, no chained equalities, and no extra text. Answer format: a single algebraic expression for the target quantity. Use the variable names from the problem and ASCII characters only; do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign.

step_1.content: Split the original system into a p_0-only beam and a B_y-only beam, then enforce compatibility at B through the rod extension.
step_1.key_point: Use superposition and displacement compatibility at point B.

step_3.content: Introduce unknown upward force B_y at B as the second subproblem on the same support geometry.

step_5.content: Relate rod force and elongation by axial relation, then combine with v(L/2)=-e to solve B_y.
step_5.key_point: Compatibility and constitutive relation close the equation set.

step_7.content: Substitute solved e into B_y expression and simplify to the final closed form.
step_7.key_point: Substitute e and simplify to the closed-form B_y.
